goal: Install standalone WatchTower repo on INTEL, verify service stability, broadcast presence, and non-destructive rescue smoke readiness from HASHI1.

requires: route and file transfer preflight green
package manifest includes sha256 and byte sizes
existing Intel WatchTower removed or upgraded only with rollback

risks: Intel path or username may differ from assumed C:\Users\Print
Windows service install may require elevated rights
Intel HASHI root may differ from assumed path
hchat protocol transport times out but cached Workbench API delivery succeeds
